data.title: Aesthetic Usability Effect
data.description: Visually appealing design influences perceived usability and enhances user satisfaction.
data.technical_spec: Use of modern and minimalistic design elements with intuitive navigation.

data.title: Hick's Law
data.description: Limits on-screen choices to reduce decision time and potential confusion for users.
data.technical_spec: Simplified menus and personalized recommendations based on user habits.

data.title: Fitts's Law
data.description: Design elements are designed for efficient selection and interaction, more accessible on varying devices.
data.technical_spec: Use of large clickable areas for key actions, optimized for touch interfaces.

data.title: Cognitive Load Reduction
data.description: Reduces cognitive load with clear, straightforward design and easy-to-use navigation.
data.technical_spec: Progressive disclosure and well-organized content categories.

data.title: Loading Perception
data.description: Minimizes perceived loading times with smart loading indicators and asynchronous loading.
data.technical_spec: Use of preloading and caching to provide instant feedback and content transition.
